title: Mass-shadow mine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''mass-shadow mine''' was a [[Space mine/Legends|space mine]] developed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the final stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The mass-shadow [[Mine/Legends|mine]] was essentially an advanced proximity-based space mine that would explode when it detected the presence of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. After exploding, a [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] surge would be released, simulating the effects of a planetary gravity well mass shadow and would force a ship out of hyperspace. The aim of the weapon was primarily to ambush ships journeying across hyperspace by shutting down their hyperspace engines, and was extensively used during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] where mass shadow mines prevented [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] reinforcements from arriving to aid the defenders of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

A later refinement of this technology was the [[Empion mine]] used by the forces of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] and Admiral [[Apwar Trigit]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
